title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain founded Glean, a company valued at $7 billion, after already building one unicorn. His approach emphasizes focus and avoiding competition in crowded spaces rather than building bigger models or pursuing aggressive marketing.
